settings.title: Settings
settings.ownLocatorHint: Maidenhead locator of your station (e.g. JN47ao)

about.title: About QSOlog
about.appDescription: QSOlog is an offline-first logbook for amateur radio operators. All QSO data is stored locally in your browser (IndexedDB) – no data is transmitted to a server unless you enable the optional callsign lookup feature.
about.openSource: The source code is freely available on
about.legalBasis: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act)
about.privacyLocal: QSOlog stores all data exclusively in your browser (IndexedDB). No personal data is transmitted to the operator of this website.
about.privacyLookup: If you enable the optional callsign lookup via QRZ.com or HamQTH, requests are sent directly from your browser to the respective third-party service. The privacy policies of the respective providers apply.
about.privacyGitHub: This website is hosted on GitHub Pages. GitHub may collect technical access data (e.g. IP addresses). For details, see the GitHub Privacy Statement.
about.licenseText: QSOlog is free software under the
about.disclaimerContent: The contents of this website are created with the utmost care. However, the operator assumes no liability for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the provided content.
about.disclaimerLinks: This website contains links to third-party websites whose content is beyond the operator's control. The respective provider is always responsible for the content of linked pages.
about.aiText: Parts of this software were developed with the assistance of AI coding tools (e.g. Claude, GitHub Copilot). All code has been reviewed and is maintained by human contributors.

common.dragDropHint: Drag file here or click to select
common.offlineReady: App is ready for offline use.
common.installPrompt: Install QSOlog as an app for quick access.
